FR-01.title: Vendor Registration
requirements: Apply to become a seller with business details

FR-02.title: Vendor Store Setup
requirements: Customize storefront with logo and banner

FR-03.title: Product Listing
requirements: Add products with title, description, images

FR-04.title: Product Approval
requirements: Quality check for images and descriptions

FR-05.title: Multi-vendor Cart
requirements: Cart supports items from multiple vendors
Group items by vendor in cart

FR-06.title: Checkout with Split Payment
requirements: Payment split to vendors per commission

FR-07.title: Order Routing
requirements: Route order items to respective vendors

FR-10.title: Vendor Payouts
requirements: Payout to bank account or PayPal

FR-11.title: Product Search
requirements: Filter by price, rating, vendor, category

FR-13.title: Dispute Resolution
requirements: Buyer opens dispute for order issues

FR-17.title: Wishlist
requirements: Price drop notifications for saved items

FR-23.title: Inventory Sync
requirements: Vendor syncs inventory from external system

FR-24.title: Mobile App
requirements: Push notifications for offers and orders

FR-29.title: Bulk Operations
requirements: Vendor bulk product upload via CSV

FR-01.title: Build Vendor Registration API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for vendor registration feature in Multi-Vendor eCommerce Marketplace. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Vendor Registration UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for vendor registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.
